info.title: Idea Foundry — CrewAI Product Feature Planner API
info.description: HTTP interface for triggering CrewAI flows.

run_id.title: Run Id
run_id.description: The run this activity belongs to.

cost_tracking_available.title: Cost Tracking Available
cost_tracking_available.description: Whether per-event cost/token tracking is available. When False, tokens_delta and cost_usd_delta are always 0.

AdminProjectItem.title: AdminProjectItem
AdminProjectItem.description: Project item for admin cross-org listing.

reports_to.title: Reports To
reports_to.description: Agent ID of supervisor, or null for top.

status.title: Status
status.description: Agent status within this run: idle, active, waiting_approval, error, done.

current_step.title: Current Step
current_step.description: 1-based step the agent is on, null if idle/done.

last_activity_at.title: Last Activity At
last_activity_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of last activity in this run.

tokens_used.title: Tokens Used
tokens_used.description: Cumulative tokens consumed for this run.

cost_usd.title: Cost Usd
cost_usd.description: Cumulative cost in USD for this run.

AgentRosterItem.title: AgentRosterItem
AgentRosterItem.description: One agent participating in a flow run.

ApprovalAction.title: ApprovalAction
ApprovalAction.description: Hint for frontend about which endpoint to call.

kind.title: Kind
kind.description: Approval type: prd_section_approval, publish_confluence, publish_jira, resume_paused.

waiting_since.title: Waiting Since
waiting_since.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this started waiting.

ApprovalItem.title: ApprovalItem
ApprovalItem.description: A single item awaiting user action.

confluence_base_url.title: Confluence Base Url
confluence_base_url.description: Optional separate Confluence base URL. Defaults to jira_base_url.

AtlassianCredentialRequest.title: AtlassianCredentialRequest
AtlassianCredentialRequest.description:
Frontend sends this to upsert Atlassian credentials.

Field names match the frontend convention (``jira_`` prefix).
The proxy normalises to Agent Worker names before forwarding.

kind.title: Kind
kind.description: Item type: idea, prd_section, publish_confluence, publish_jira.

blocked_by.title: Blocked By
blocked_by.description: IDs of items that block this item.

working_ideas_count.title: Working Ideas Count
working_ideas_count.description: Working ideas linked to this project

crew_jobs_count.title: Crew Jobs Count
crew_jobs_count.description: Crew jobs linked to this project

total_documents.title: Total Documents
total_documents.description: Total documents that would be cascaded

CodeRepoListResponse.title: CodeRepoListResponse
CodeRepoListResponse.description: Paginated list matching frontend RepoList type.

CodeRepoResponse.title: CodeRepoResponse
CodeRepoResponse.description: Repo response matching frontend Repo type.

CombinedPublishResult.title: CombinedPublishResult
CombinedPublishResult.description: Combined Confluence publish + Jira creation result.

ConfluenceBatchResult.title: ConfluenceBatchResult
ConfluenceBatchResult.description: Summary of a batch Confluence publish operation.

sections_changed.title: Sections Changed
sections_changed.description: Section keys that changed since last publish.

ConfluencePreviewResponse.title: ConfluencePreviewResponse
ConfluencePreviewResponse.description: Preview of Confluence-formatted content before publishing.

ConfluencePublishResult.title: ConfluencePublishResult
ConfluencePublishResult.description: Result from a single Confluence publish operation.

ideation_session_id.title: Ideation Session Id
ideation_session_id.description: Link to ideation session that spawned this idea

DeliveryStatusResponse.title: DeliveryStatusResponse
DeliveryStatusResponse.description: Full delivery status for a run_id from the productRequirements collection.

error_code.title: Error Code
error_code.description: Machine-readable error code. One of: LLM_ERROR, BILLING_ERROR, INTERNAL_ERROR.

run_id.title: Run Id
run_id.description: The run_id affected by this error, if applicable.

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: Additional diagnostic detail (e.g. the original exception message).

ErrorResponse.title: ErrorResponse
ErrorResponse.description:
Standard error envelope returned by all API endpoints.

Returned for any unexpected server-side error (HTTP 500) or when
the upstream LLM / OpenAI service is unavailable (HTTP 503).

Error codes:
    ``LLM_ERROR``      — The LLM backend returned an unrecoverable
                         error after exhausting all retry attempts
                         (e.g. timeouts, model overload).
    ``BILLING_ERROR``  — OpenAI billing / quota issue detected
                         (e.g. ``insufficient_quota``,
                         ``billing_hard_limit_reached``).
    ``INTERNAL_ERROR`` — Any other unexpected server-side failure.

is_approved.title: Is Approved
is_approved.description: Whether the executive summary has been approved.

ExecutiveSummaryDraft.title: ExecutiveSummaryDraft
ExecutiveSummaryDraft.description: Tracks the iterative executive summary produced in the draft phase.

critique.title: Critique
critique.description: Critique feedback from critique_prd_task, initially null.

ExecutiveSummaryIteration.title: ExecutiveSummaryIteration
ExecutiveSummaryIteration.description: A single iteration record for the executive summary phase.

status.title: Status
status.description: New status. Only 'archived' and 'paused' transitions are supported.

approved_output.title: Approved Output
approved_output.description: Explicit output to save (if user edited agent's output).

IdeationAdvanceRequest.title: IdeationAdvanceRequest
IdeationAdvanceRequest.description: Approve current step output and advance to the next.

IdeationAdvanceResponse.title: IdeationAdvanceResponse
IdeationAdvanceResponse.description: Response when advancing to the next step.

IdeationErrorResponse.title: IdeationErrorResponse
IdeationErrorResponse.description: Standard error response for ideation endpoints.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: Optional feedback to guide the re-iteration.

IdeationIterateRequest.title: IdeationIterateRequest
IdeationIterateRequest.description: Request re-iteration of the current step with optional feedback.

idea.title: Idea
idea.description: Initial idea text to seed the session.

title.title: Title
title.description: Optional title for the session. Auto-generated if omitted.

project_id.title: Project Id
project_id.description: Link this session to an existing project.

message.title: Message
message.default: Ideation session started. The Ideation Agent is analyzing your idea.

IdeationKickoffResponse.title: IdeationKickoffResponse
IdeationKickoffResponse.description: Response when a new session is created.

IdeationRespondRequest.title: IdeationRespondRequest
IdeationRespondRequest.description: User responds to an agent question/prompt.

IdeationRespondResponse.title: IdeationRespondResponse
IdeationRespondResponse.description: Response after submitting a user message.

target_step.title: Target Step
target_step.description: Step name to roll back to (e.g. 'ideation'). If omitted, goes to previous.

IdeationRollbackRequest.title: IdeationRollbackRequest
IdeationRollbackRequest.description: Request rollback to a specific or previous step.

IdeationRollbackResponse.title: IdeationRollbackResponse
IdeationRollbackResponse.description: Response when rolling back to a previous step.

configured.title: Configured
configured.description: Whether all required credentials are set.

base_url.title: Base Url
base_url.description: The base URL of the service (masked).

JiraBatchResult.title: JiraBatchResult
JiraBatchResult.description: Summary of a batch Jira ticket creation.

JiraCreateResult.title: JiraCreateResult
JiraCreateResult.description: Result from Jira ticket creation for a single run.

status.title: Status
status.description: Job lifecycle status: queued, running, awaiting_approval, paused, or completed. Note: flow errors always result in 'paused' (not 'failed'), allowing the run to be resumed.

error.title: Error
error.description: Error message when the job was paused due to an error. Present when the job encountered an LLM, billing, or internal error and was automatically paused.

queued_at.title: Queued At
queued_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the job was created.

completed_at.title: Completed At
completed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the job reached a terminal state.

queue_time_ms.title: Queue Time Ms
queue_time_ms.description: Time spent in queue (started_at - queued_at) in milliseconds.

running_time_ms.title: Running Time Ms
running_time_ms.description: Time spent running (completed_at - started_at) in milliseconds.

output_file.title: Output File
output_file.description: Path to the generated PRD markdown file, if available.

confluence_url.title: Confluence Url
confluence_url.description: URL of the published Confluence page, if available.

JobDetail.title: JobDetail
JobDetail.description: A persistent job record from the ``crewJobs`` collection.

MessageMetadata.title: MessageMetadata
MessageMetadata.description: Metadata attached to agent messages for UI rendering.

project_count.title: Project Count
project_count.description: Number of projects in this org

run_id.title: Run Id
run_id.description: The run this action was applied to.

action.title: Action
action.description: The action that was taken: 'approved', 'continuing refinement', 'continuing refinement with user feedback', or 'paused'.

section.title: Section
section.description: The section key the action was applied to.

current_step.title: Current Step
current_step.description: 1-based step number of the current section.

sections_approved.title: Sections Approved
sections_approved.description: Number of sections approved so far (including this one if approved).

sections_total.title: Sections Total
sections_total.description: Total number of sections in the PRD.

is_final_section.title: Is Final Section
is_final_section.description: True when this approval completed the last section — the flow will finalize.

active_agents.title: Active Agents
active_agents.description: Provider identifiers currently participating in the flow (e.g. ['openai']).

dropped_agents.title: Dropped Agents
dropped_agents.description: Provider identifiers that were removed from the flow after failing during parallel drafting.

agent_errors.title: Agent Errors
agent_errors.description: Map of dropped provider name to its error message.

PRDActionResponse.title: PRDActionResponse
PRDActionResponse.description: Response for approval, pause, and feedback actions.

run_id.title: Run Id
run_id.description: The run to approve or continue.

approve.title: Approve
approve.description: True to approve the current section, False to keep refining.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: Optional critique feedback from the user. When provided with approve=false, this feedback is used as the critique for the current section instead of the agent's self-critique.
examples: Add more detail to the security section and include OAuth2 flow.

selected_agent.title: Selected Agent
selected_agent.description: Which agent's result to use (e.g. 'openai'). Required when multiple agents produced results for the current section. Defaults to the first available agent when omitted.

sections.title: Sections
sections.description: Ordered list of PRD sections with their current state.

all_approved.title: All Approved
all_approved.description: True when every section has been approved.

PRDDraftDetail.title: PRDDraftDetail
PRDDraftDetail.description: Structured draft state for API responses.

idea.title: Idea
idea.description: The product feature idea to build a PRD for.
examples: Add dark mode to the dashboard

title.title: Title
title.description: Short display title for the idea. Used in dashboards and project views. When empty, the first line of the idea text is used as a fallback.

project_id.title: Project Id
project_id.description: Associate this PRD run with an existing project. Links the idea to the project so it inherits Confluence/Jira config. When empty, the idea is created without a project.

auto_approve.title: Auto Approve
auto_approve.description: When true, the flow runs end-to-end without pausing for manual approval at each section (same behaviour as the CLI). Sections auto-iterate between PRD_SECTION_MIN_ITERATIONS and PRD_SECTION_MAX_ITERATIONS and are auto-approved when the critique contains SECTION_READY after the minimum iterations. The POST /flow/prd/approve endpoint is not needed when this is enabled — poll GET /flow/runs/{run_id} for progress instead.

run_id.title: Run Id
run_id.description: Unique identifier for this flow run.

PRDKickoffResponse.title: PRDKickoffResponse
PRDKickoffResponse.description:
Response for POST /flow/prd/kickoff.

Returned when a new PRD flow is accepted.  The flow runs in the
background through Idea Refinement → Requirements Breakdown →
Phase 1 (Executive Summary iteration) → Phase 2 (9-section
auto-iterate).  Poll GET /flow/runs/{run_id} for status.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last activity.

sections.title: Sections
sections.description: Section keys that have draft content.

exec_summary_iterations.title: Exec Summary Iterations
exec_summary_iterations.description: Number of executive summary iterations completed.

req_breakdown_iterations.title: Req Breakdown Iterations
req_breakdown_iterations.description: Number of requirements breakdown iterations completed.

PRDResumableRun.title: PRDResumableRun
PRDResumableRun.description: An unfinalized run that can be resumed.

run_id.title: Run Id
run_id.description: The run_id of an unfinalized working idea to resume.

auto_approve.title: Auto Approve
auto_approve.description: When true, the resumed flow runs end-to-end without pausing for manual approval at each section (same behaviour as the CLI). Poll GET /flow/runs/{run_id} for progress instead of calling POST /flow/prd/approve.

next_section.title: Next Section
next_section.description: Key of the next section to iterate.

next_step.title: Next Step
next_step.description: 1-based step number of the next section.

PRDResumeResponse.title: PRDResumeResponse
PRDResumeResponse.description:
Response for POST /flow/prd/resume.

Returned when a paused or unfinalized run is successfully resumed.
Sections with existing content will skip the draft step and resume
directly into the critique→refine loop.  Degenerate content left by
a previous crash is cleaned up automatically.

iteration.title: Iteration
iteration.description: Total iteration count across all sections.  In the two-phase flow, Phase 1 (Executive Summary) iterates ≥ PRD_EXEC_RESUME_THRESHOLD times, and Phase 2 sections each iterate between PRD_SECTION_MIN_ITERATIONS and PRD_SECTION_MAX_ITERATIONS.

update_date.title: Update Date
update_date.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last update.

completed_at.title: Completed At
completed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the run was completed.

error.title: Error
error.description: Error message if the run was paused due to an error. Prefixed with an error code: BILLING_ERROR, LLM_ERROR, or INTERNAL_ERROR. Note: errors always result in status='paused' (never 'failed'), so the run can be resumed after the issue is resolved.

current_section_key.title: Current Section Key
current_section_key.description: Key of the section currently being iterated.

current_step.title: Current Step
current_step.description: 1-based step number of the current section.

sections_approved.title: Sections Approved
sections_approved.description: Number of approved sections (convenience, derivable from current_draft).

active_agents.title: Active Agents
active_agents.description: Provider identifiers currently participating in the flow (e.g. ['openai']).

dropped_agents.title: Dropped Agents
dropped_agents.description: Provider identifiers that were removed after failing during parallel drafting.

agent_errors.title: Agent Errors
agent_errors.description: Map of dropped agent name to its error message.

original_idea.title: Original Idea
original_idea.description: The raw idea before the Idea Refinement agent enriched it. Empty when refinement was skipped.

idea_refined.title: Idea Refined
idea_refined.description: Whether the idea was refined by the Idea Refinement agent.

finalized_idea.title: Finalized Idea
finalized_idea.description: Copy of the last executive summary content once Phase 1 completes. Empty until the executive summary iteration loop finishes.

requirements_breakdown.title: Requirements Breakdown
requirements_breakdown.description: Structured product requirements produced by the Requirements Breakdown agent. Empty until the breakdown phase completes.

executive_summary.description: Iterative executive summary produced in Phase 1. Contains the full iteration history with content, critique, and timestamps for each cycle.

confluence_url.title: Confluence Url
confluence_url.description: URL of the Confluence page where the PRD was published. Empty until post-completion publishing succeeds.

jira_output.title: Jira Output
jira_output.description: Summary of Jira tickets created from PRD requirements. Empty until post-completion ticketing completes.

output_file.title: Output File
output_file.description: Path to the generated PRD markdown file on disk. Empty until the flow finalizes.

ux_design_status.title: Ux Design Status
ux_design_status.description: UX design generation status: '' (not started), 'generating', or 'completed'.

ux_design_content.title: Ux Design Content
ux_design_content.description: UX design markdown content. Empty until UX design generation completes.

current_draft.description: Full structured draft with per-section state.

agents.title: Agents
agents.description: Agents that have participated in this flow run, with per-run token/cost data and current status.

cost_tracking_available.title: Cost Tracking Available
cost_tracking_available.description: Whether per-agent cost/token tracking is available. When False, tokens_used and cost_usd are always 0.

step.title: Step
step.description: 1-based step number in the PRD workflow.

updated_date.title: Updated Date
updated_date.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last update to this section.

agent_results.title: Agent Results
agent_results.description: Per-agent draft results. Keys are provider identifiers (e.g. 'openai'), values are the markdown content each agent produced for this section.

selected_agent.title: Selected Agent
selected_agent.description: Which agent's result was selected by the user.

PRDSectionDetail.title: PRDSectionDetail
PRDSectionDetail.description: A section's state as returned in run-status responses.

PendingListResponse.title: PendingListResponse
PendingListResponse.description: List of PRDs pending Confluence / Jira delivery.

output_file.title: Output File
output_file.description: Absolute path to the output markdown file.

confluence_url.title: Confluence Url
confluence_url.description: URL of the Confluence page (empty if unpublished).

jira_completed.title: Jira Completed
jira_completed.description: Whether Jira tickets have been created.

PendingPRDItem.title: PendingPRDItem
PendingPRDItem.description: A single PRD pending publishing or Jira ticketing.

PublishingErrorResponse.title: PublishingErrorResponse
PublishingErrorResponse.description: Standard error envelope for publishing endpoints.

RemotePurgeResult.title: RemotePurgeResult
RemotePurgeResult.description: Result of remote Jira/Confluence deletion attempt.

StepOutput.title: StepOutput
StepOutput.description: Output state for a single flow step.

TimelineEvent.title: TimelineEvent
TimelineEvent.description: A single event in the PRD journey timeline.

run_id.title: Run Id
run_id.description: The PRD run ID to generate UX design for.

run_id.title: Run Id
run_id.description: The PRD run ID being processed.

current_step.title: Current Step
current_step.description: Current UX design step label, if available.

design_md_ready.title: Design Md Ready
design_md_ready.description: Whether the UX design markdown content is ready.

stitch_completed.title: Stitch Completed
stitch_completed.description: Whether the design sections have been stitched.

figma_uploaded.title: Figma Uploaded
figma_uploaded.description: Whether the design was uploaded to Figma.

error.title: Error
error.description: Error message if UX design generation failed.

url.title: Url
url.description: HTTP(S) URL to fetch and ingest

UserProfileResponse.title: UserProfileResponse
UserProfileResponse.description: Merged user profile — SSO identity (read-only) + local prefs.

UserProfileUpdateRequest.title: UserProfileUpdateRequest
UserProfileUpdateRequest.description: Fields that can be updated via PATCH.

watcher_running.title: Watcher Running
watcher_running.description: Whether the file watcher is active.

scheduler_running.title: Scheduler Running
scheduler_running.description: Whether the cron scheduler is active.

WatcherStatusResponse.title: WatcherStatusResponse
WatcherStatusResponse.description: Status of the file watcher and cron scheduler.

agent_id.title: Agent Id
agent_id.description: Agent registry ID that produced this event (e.g. 'product_manager').

tokens_delta.title: Tokens Delta
tokens_delta.description: Tokens consumed by this event; 0 if unknown.

cost_usd_delta.title: Cost Usd Delta
cost_usd_delta.description: Cost in USD for this event; 0.0 if unknown.

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: One-line human summary of the event.
